name: Alligator Bites
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Well trimmed alligator - tenderloin; cut into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the alligator in the dry Dixie Fry, shaking off the excess.
2. Deep fry in the cooking oil (use a deep fat fryer if you have one).
3. Cook until just golden brown.
4. Serve hot with Tartar sauce or red horseradish cocktail type sauce.
5. Cut into bite-sized pieces to ensure they are not tough and cook quickly.
6. If 2 pounds is too much, use only 1 pound.
NOTES: Wild Boar can be substituted nicely in this recipe.
